title: Drupal security advisory (AV26-225)
description: On March 11, 2026, Drupal published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: Unpublished Node Permissions  versions prior to 1.7.0
AI (Artificial Intelligence)  versions prior to 1.1.11 and 1.2.x versions prior to 1.2.12
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
